title: Nether Fortress Loot
quickAnswer: Nether fortresses matter more for progression than chest value. Blaze rods and nether wart are the main reasons to find one, while chest loot is a bonus.
keyFacts: Fortresses provide blaze spawners for rods and brewing progression.
Nether wart naturally generates in fortress stair rooms and is needed for most useful potions.
Chest loot can include gold, diamonds, obsidian, saddles, and horse armor, but the structure is not mainly a treasure run.
commonMistakes: Treating a fortress like a bastion and entering undergeared just for chest loot.
Leaving without nether wart because you focused only on blaze fights.
